response.original_title: Amy Macdonald - Live at Baloise Session 2014
response.overview: Amy Macdonald brings her unmistakable voice and melodic folk-rock energy to the Baloise Session 2014. Backed by a tight band, she moves confidently between intimate acoustic moments and driving anthems, delivering songs with warmth, grit and natural charm. The performance highlights her gift for direct storytelling, memorable choruses and a strong connection with the audience, creating an uplifting concert that feels both polished and genuinely personal. From its opening note to the final encore
response.title: Amy Macdonald - Live at Baloise Session 2014
